title: Restaurant Settings
description: Manage your restaurant's information, branding, and online presence.

placeholders.description: A brief description of your restaurant
placeholders.descriptionJa: 日本語でレストランを説明してください
placeholders.descriptionVi: Mô tả nhà hàng của bạn bằng tiếng Việt

operatingHours.title: Operating Hours
operatingHours.description: Set your restaurant's daily operating hours.
operatingHours.helpText: Customers will see these on your restaurant page.

socialLinks.helpText: Add your social media profiles to help customers connect with you.

deliveryOptions.title: Service Options
deliveryOptions.description: Choose how customers can enjoy your food

aiDescription.title: ✨ AI-Powered Description Generator
aiDescription.subtitle: Let AI create compelling descriptions in all three languages for your restaurant
aiDescription.additionalInfoPlaceholder: Any unique features, history, or special information about your restaurant...
aiDescription.disclaimer: AI-generated content should be reviewed and edited as needed.

errors.missingName: Please enter a restaurant name first
errors.generationFailed: Failed to generate descriptions. Please try again.

notifications.successMessage: Your restaurant settings have been updated successfully.
notifications.logoRemovedMessage: Logo removed. Save changes to confirm.
notifications.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload an image.
notifications.settingsSaveFailedGeneric: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
notifications.compressionError: Error compressing image. Please try a different image or check its format.
notifications.subdomainCheckError: Domain name is not available or invalid

name.maxLength: Name must be {maxLength} characters or less

subdomain.minLength: Domain must be at least {minLength} characters
subdomain.maxLength: Domain must be {maxLength} characters or less
subdomain.invalidFormat: Domain can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

tax.min: 税率は0%以上である必要があります
tax.max: 税率は100%を超えることはできません

address.maxLength: Address must be {maxLength} characters or less

phone.maxLength: Phone number must be {maxLength} characters or less

email.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid email address
email.maxLength: Email must be {maxLength} characters or less

website.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid website URL
website.maxLength: Website URL must be {maxLength} characters or less

description.maxLength: Description must be {maxLength} characters or less

logoFile.maxSize: Logo file must be {maxSize}MB or less
logoFile.invalidType: Logo must be PNG, JPEG, or WebP format

domainManagement.title: Domain Management
domainManagement.infoText: Your customers will access your menu and ordering system through your custom domain.

descriptions.title: Restaurant Descriptions
descriptions.description: Create compelling descriptions in multiple languages
